x-no-charges-y: {0} has no charges left! Recharge with {1}.
tool-ready-in-x: So it shall be. Come back in {0} days.
tutorial-1: To cast a spell, hold a wand and press the use tool button.
tutorial-2: This will darken the screen and let you draw a pattern in the darkness.
tutorial-3: Hold down the use tool button and draw the pattern. When a pattern is recognized, the name of the spell will appear.
tutorial-4: Let go of the button to set the spell, then you can use the wand to cast it.
